title: The Poor Man's Part.
content:
Tell me, rich man, for what intent
    Thou load'st with gold thy vestiment?
    Whenas the poor cry out: To us
    Belongs all gold superfluous.
meaning:
"The Poor Man's Part." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
